channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Lebanon Latest: Ceasefire talks continue under fire
item.description: Israel expands ground operations in southern Lebanon as ceasefire efforts remain stalled.

item.title: Firefighters on scene at Pentagon during ‘hazardous materials incident’
item.description: Department of Defense spokesman says 'shelter-in-place order' given after air quality issue detected.

item.title: Trailer: Israel’s Darkest Weapon | Al Jazeera Originals
item.description: Investigation exposes decades of alleged Israeli torture and sexual violence against Palestinian detainees

item.title: LIVE: Mexico vs South Africa – World Cup 2026
item.description: Follow our live build-up, with full opening ceremony and team news coverage, ahead of our text commentary stream.

item.title: Trump says US will ‘be taking’ Kharg Island in latest Iran war threat
item.description: Trump says US will be hitting Iran 'very hard' as two days of strikes threaten to derail ceasefire negotiations.

item.title: Israel’s Darkest Weapon | Al Jazeera Originals
item.description: Investigation exposes decades of alleged Israeli torture and sexual violence against Palestinian detainees

item.title: Somali referee banned by US to officiate European Super Cup, UEFA says
item.description: Omar Artan ​was named among match officials ​for 2026 World Cup but will miss the tournament after US refuses him entry.

item.title: Ilia Topuria vs Justin Gaethje title fight at UFC Freedom 250: All to know
item.description: Fight time, undercard, stats and how to watch as Topuria and Gaethje tussle in front of Donald Trump at the White House.

item.title: I saw Kushner’s Albania resort up close — it is an environmental disaster
item.description: The damage at Vjosa-Narta is not fake news. Bulldozers are tearing into one of Europe’s most precious wetlands.

item.title: Argentina fans denied US visas get free TVs to watch World Cup
item.description: Argentina fans denied US visas get free TVs to watch World Cup.

item.title: World chess body suspends Russia over activities in occupied-Ukraine
item.description: Russia is accused of usurping control of the game in areas of Ukraine captured by Russian forces since 2022.

item.title: Palestine Action activists could face UK ‘terror’ sentences: What we know
item.description: Four members of the Palestine Action group could be sentenced as 'terrorists' over Elbit factory raid in 2024.

item.title: Iran shuts Hormuz strait: But wasn’t it already closed?
item.description: The strait is a crucial maritime route, through which 20 percent of global oil and natural gas is shipped in peacetime.

item.title: ‘Dignity has no passport’: Pope makes appeal for migrants in Canary Islands
item.description: Pope Leo will meet with about 1,000 migrants on Friday who have braved dangerous Atlantic waters to reach Europe.

item.title: At least 22 killed as Pakistani military helicopter crashes in Kashmir
item.description: Officials launch inquiry after 'technical fault' causes an army Mi-17 to crash in Pakistan-administered Kashmir.

item.title: Video shows aftermath of Iranian attack in Bahrain
item.description: Iranian strikes on Bahrain left cars, homes and buildings damaged in Hamad Town and Manama.

item.title: Did US sneak 100 million barrels of oil out of Hormuz, as Trump claims?
item.description: The maths doesn't appear to hold up, even though the US has likely managed to get some oil out of the strait.

item.title: Massive Neymar mural unveiled on Brazil street
item.description: A massive 850-square-meter street mural of football star Neymar da Silva has been unveiled in Brazil's Novo Hamburgo.

item.title: Embattled Palestinian president of Oxford Union: ‘I’m not resigning’
item.description: Arwa Elrayess, the first Palestinian to lead University of Oxford's debating society, has been troubled by falsehoods.

item.title: India says US hit another ship off Oman, confirms 3 dead in separate attack
item.description: All 20 Indians aboard vessel involved in the latest incident are safe, said an Indian shipping ministry official.

item.title: Top five ‘must-watch’ matches of the group stage at World Cup 2026
item.description: There are a record 72 group games at this summer's tournament, and we've picked the matches that you shouldn't miss.

item.title: The university must not become a supply chain for AI
item.description: Cash-strapped universities are being told to make AI central to their missions, by the people selling the AI.

item.title: Ethiopia must not be dragged back into war
item.description: TPLF hardliners, backed by Eritrea, are threatening to drag Ethiopia back into a war its people have already rejected.

item.title: Britain’s defence ⁠secretary Healey quits over defence spending
item.description: John Healey's resignation deepens Starmer's crisis as defence secretary quits over military spending dispute.

item.title: Video shows Gaza teen fisherman before Israeli forces killed him at sea
item.description: Mohammad Abu Giab was a 15-year-old fisherman from Gaza that was shot dead by Israeli forces off Deir el-Balah.
